ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Petition To Close Estate
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maggie Mouradian appeared by Court Call for Thomas Voeller.

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes and stated that this estate was open to admit the will and there are no assets in the estate. The Court questioned when a petition to close estate can be filed. Counsel stated that a petition to close estate can be with within this week. The matter is continued to April 6, 2015 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition to close estate. Other issues are taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
